usernameMin.en: Username must be at least 3 characters
usernameMin.zh-CN: 用户名至少需要 3 个字符

usernameMax.en: Username must be at most 64 characters
usernameMax.zh-CN: 用户名不能超过 64 个字符

usernamePattern.en: Username can only contain letters, digits, dots, underscores, and hyphens
usernamePattern.zh-CN: 用户名只能包含字母、数字、点、下划线和连字符

passwordMin.en: Password must be at least 12 characters
passwordMin.zh-CN: 密码至少需要 12 个字符

passwordMax.en: Password must be at most 128 characters
passwordMax.zh-CN: 密码不能超过 128 个字符

passwordMismatch.en: The two passwords do not match
passwordMismatch.zh-CN: 两次输入的新密码不一致

hostnameMax.en: Hostname must be at most 253 characters
hostnameMax.zh-CN: 域名不能超过 253 个字符

hostnamePattern.en: Enter a standard ASCII or Punycode hostname
hostnamePattern.zh-CN: 请输入标准 ASCII 或 Punycode 域名

routePathStart.zh-CN: 路由路径必须以 / 开头

routePathNewline.zh-CN: 路由路径不能包含换行

urlInvalid.en: Please enter a full HTTP or HTTPS URL
urlInvalid.zh-CN: 请输入完整的 HTTP 或 HTTPS URL

urlScheme.en: URL must be HTTP/HTTPS without credentials
urlScheme.zh-CN: URL 只允许 HTTP/HTTPS，且不能包含凭据

staticRootAbsolute.en: Static root must be an absolute path
staticRootAbsolute.zh-CN: 静态目录必须是绝对路径

indexFileFormat.en: Index file name format is invalid

indexFileDot.en: Index file name cannot be . or ..
indexFileDot.zh-CN: 首页文件名不能是 . 或 ..

headerValueNewline.en: Header value cannot contain newlines or NUL
headerValueNewline.zh-CN: Header 值不能包含换行或 NUL

advancedBlock.en: Advanced config does not allow blocks or NUL
advancedBlock.zh-CN: 高级配置不允许 block 或 NUL

advancedLineInvalid.en: Line {{n}} of advanced config is not an allowed directive
advancedLineInvalid.zh-CN: 高级配置第 {{n}} 行不是允许的指令

aliasesDuplicate.en: Primary hostname and aliases cannot duplicate
aliasesDuplicate.zh-CN: 主域名和别名不能重复

routesDuplicate.en: Route paths cannot duplicate within a domain
routesDuplicate.zh-CN: 同一域名中的路由路径不能重复

headerRouteMissing.en: Header references a route that does not exist
headerRouteMissing.zh-CN: Header 引用的路由不存在

hstsRequiresHttps.zh-CN: 启用 HTTPS 后才能添加 HSTS

logTypesMixed.en: types and the legacy type parameter cannot be used together
logTypesMixed.zh-CN: types 与旧 type 参数不能同时使用

logTypesInvalid.en: types can only contain access,error with at least one selected
logTypesInvalid.zh-CN: types 只能包含 access,error 且至少选择一项

logFieldRequired.zh-CN: 日志字段 {{field}} 不能移除

credentialNameMax.en: Credential name must be at most 64 characters
credentialNameMax.zh-CN: 凭据名称不能超过 64 个字符

credentialTokenMin.en: Please enter a valid Cloudflare API token
credentialTokenMin.zh-CN: 请输入有效的 Cloudflare API Token

credentialTokenMax.en: Cloudflare API token is too long

idempotencyKeyReused.en: Idempotency-Key already used for another operation

renewalSourceUnavailable.en: Certificate source order or Domain is unavailable
renewalSourceUnavailable.zh-CN: 证书来源订单或 Domain 不可用

certificateSanDrift.en: The Domain hostname does not match the Active certificate SAN; re-request the certificate
certificateSanDrift.zh-CN: 当前 Domain hostname 与 Active Certificate SAN 不一致，请重新申请证书

domainHasActiveOrder.en: An in-progress certificate order already exists for this domain
domainHasActiveOrder.zh-CN: 该域名已有进行中的证书订单

cloudflareCredentialInvalid.en: The Cloudflare credential used for renewal is invalid
cloudflareCredentialInvalid.zh-CN: 续期使用的 Cloudflare 凭据无效

logStreamCapacityExceeded.en: Live log connection limit reached; close an existing connection first
logStreamCapacityExceeded.zh-CN: 实时日志连接已达上限，请先关闭已有连接

runtimeDegraded.en: Runtime config is inconsistent; rebuild it in Diagnostics first
runtimeDegraded.zh-CN: 运行配置不一致，请先在 Diagnostics 中重建

serverShuttingDown.en: The service is shutting down; please retry shortly
serverShuttingDown.zh-CN: 服务正在停止，请稍后重试

activeRuntimeConfigInvalid.en: Active Domain config is unreadable or checksum mismatch
activeRuntimeConfigInvalid.zh-CN: Active Domain 配置不可读或 checksum 不一致

domainDisabled.en: Domain is disabled; enable it first

preflightStale.zh-CN: 测试结果已过期，请重新测试

draftExists.en: An unpublished draft exists; publish or handle it before rolling back
draftExists.zh-CN: 当前有未发布草稿，请先发布或处理草稿后再回滚

domainConflictHost.en: {{hostname}} is already used by another domain

draftDeploymentRunning.en: The draft cannot be modified while a deployment is running
draftDeploymentRunning.zh-CN: 发布任务运行期间不能修改该草稿

versionConflict.en: The draft was modified by another session; refresh and retry
versionConflict.zh-CN: 草稿已被其他会话修改，请刷新后重试

resourceConflict.en: Resource already exists or conflicts with existing data
resourceConflict.zh-CN: 资源已存在或与现有数据冲突

draftChanged.en: The draft has changed; review the diff again
draftChanged.zh-CN: 草稿内容已变化，请重新查看 Diff

deploymentUnavailable.en: This operation is only allowed in the Nginx runtime
deploymentUnavailable.zh-CN: 该操作只允许在 Nginx runtime 中执行

deploymentAlreadyRunning.en: A log settings task is already running
deploymentAlreadyRunning.zh-CN: 已有日志设置任务正在执行

deploymentRequired.en: Published domains must be removed via a deployment
deploymentRequired.zh-CN: 已发布域名必须通过移除部署删除

cloudflareTokenVerifyFailed.en: Cloudflare API token verification failed; check permissions and network
cloudflareTokenVerifyFailed.zh-CN: Cloudflare API Token 验证失败，请检查权限和网络

cloudflareCredentialInUse.en: The credential still has orders awaiting use or cleanup
cloudflareCredentialInUse.zh-CN: 该凭据仍有订单等待使用或清理

revisionStorageLimitExceeded.en: Runtime artifacts capacity is full; raise the limit or wait for cleanup
revisionStorageLimitExceeded.zh-CN: Runtime artifacts 容量不足，请提高上限或等待清理

revisionStorageLimitTooLow.en: Capacity limit cannot be lower than the protected revision's actual usage ({{bytes}} bytes)
revisionStorageLimitTooLow.zh-CN: 容量上限不能低于受保护 revision 的实际用量（{{bytes}} bytes）

apiPathInvalid.en: Business API must use the same-origin /api path
apiPathInvalid.zh-CN: 业务 API 必须使用同源 /api 路径

tlsReloadFailed.zh-CN: 管理端 TLS 重新加载失败

activeDomainConfigLoadFailed.en: Failed to load Active Domain config
activeDomainConfigLoadFailed.zh-CN: Active Domain 配置加载失败

runtimeStorageInvalid.en: Capacity limit must be an integer between 512 and 20480 MiB
runtimeStorageInvalid.zh-CN: 容量上限必须是 512–20480 MiB 的整数值

authRateLimited.zh-CN: 操作过于频繁，请稍后重试

runtimeNotDegraded.en: Runtime config does not need rebuilding
runtimeNotDegraded.zh-CN: 运行配置当前不需要重建

httpsNotEnabled.en: Enable HTTPS and save the draft first
httpsNotEnabled.zh-CN: 请先启用 HTTPS 并保存草稿

sslConfigChanged.en: SSL request params do not match the current draft; refresh and retry
sslConfigChanged.zh-CN: 申请参数与当前 SSL 草稿不一致，请刷新后重试

certificateActivationNotFound.zh-CN: 证书尚未进入激活流程

cloudflareCleanupNotAvailable.en: No retryable Cloudflare cleanup task for this order
cloudflareCleanupNotAvailable.zh-CN: 该订单没有可重试的 Cloudflare 清理任务
